creator: db@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have a set of ports (including libarcus that Kyle mentions) and diffs ready to go into the tree to enable the graphical GUI Cura. I can commit the rest but this port will need updating before it will work. Kyle has a copy of the diffs to test.

See  http://www.freebsd.org/~db/cura_needed.tgz
